data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where the calendar shows wrong availability context. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the outcome of this scenario or any related traces and snapshots that would allow for an audit of the coverage. The lack of concrete evidence to support the expected result leads to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the outcome of the persona scenario.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Capture scenario outcome evidence
